text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I want to get super tough! I want to train a ton,
become the strongest and the fastest, and then
prove to the world that nobody can beat me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So let's do our best and get swole together,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
